global_description: A large, sleek seabird with a streamlined body and a predominantly white plumage. It features a distinctive black cap on the head, a long, sharp orange-red bill, and gray wings with black tips. The bird's legs are short and black.

part_details.head: White with a prominent black cap covering the top.
part_details.bill: Long, straight, and pointed, bright orange-red in color.
part_details.wings: Long and narrow, gray with black tips.
part_details.legs: Short and black, supporting the body close to the ground.
part_details.body: Streamlined and predominantly white, aiding in flight.

spatial_relations: The black cap covers the top of the head.
The orange-red bill extends forward from the face.
The gray wings are positioned laterally with black tips.
The short black legs are positioned under the body.
